title: ophrys × marcoi
intro: Ophrys × marcoi, also known as the Marco's Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys speculum and Ophrys insectifera. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ophrys × marcoi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and made into a powder for use in herbal remedies.
